description: Infographic co-branded with SAMHSA in a teal and aqua color scheme. The upper-left navy all-caps text reads 'YOUR MENTAL HEALTH MATTERS. KNOW WHERE TO SEEK HELP.' followed by 'PTSD AWARENESS MONTH' with a small teal ribbon icon. The 'SAMHSA' wordmark is faint at top right. On the right side is a flat illustration of a person with long dark hair, the hair forming a dark wave across the upper right, sitting and hugging their knees. The body is organized into columns with phone and phone-plus-text icons: 'CALL Veterans Crisis Line 1-800-273-8255 (PRESS 1); National Suicide Prevention Lifeline 1-800-273-TALK (8255); SAMHSA's National Helpline 1-800-662-HELP (4357).' and 'CALL OR TEXT Disaster Distress Helpline 1-800-985-5990' plus 'VISIT Behavioral Health Treatment Services Locator FINDTREATMENT.SAMHSA.GOV.'
notable_text: YOUR MENTAL HEALTH MATTERS. KNOW WHERE TO SEEK HELP. PTSD AWARENESS MONTH; Veterans Crisis Line 1-800-273-8255; National Suicide Prevention Lifeline 1-800-273-TALK; SAMHSA's National Helpline 1-800-662-HELP; Disaster Distress Helpline 1-800-985-5990; FINDTREATMENT.SAMHSA.GOV
